stemHtml: How does V<sub>MCG</sub> change with increasing field elevation and temperature?

options.a: decreases, because V<sub>MCG</sub> is expressed in IAS, which decreases with constant TAS and decreasing density.
options.b: increases, because V<sub>MCG</sub> is related to V<sub>1</sub> and V<sub>R</sub> and those speeds increase if the density decreases.
options.c: increases, because at a lower density a larger IAS is necessary to generate the required rudder force.
options.d: decreases, because the engine thrust decreases.
